questionHtml: State, with a reason, how the rate of reaction of cyanide with 2-chlorobutane differs from its rate of reaction with 2-bromobutane under the same conditions.
markschemeHtml:
slower AND C-Cl bond is stronger «than C-Br»

OR

slower AND Br/Br− is a better leaving group ✔

meta.title: State, with a reason, how the rate of reaction of cyanide with 2-chlorobutane differs from its rate of reaction with 2-bromobutane under the same conditions.
